problem_statement: Messaging and phone worker clients exist in the adapter client bundle, but the gateway dispatcher registers only browser, document, voice, and email/calendar adapter capabilities. The missing dispatcher bindings make SMS, chat, and phone capabilities unreachable through governed capability dispatch even when signed worker endpoints are configured.
success_criteria: Messaging SMS send, SMS draft, chat send, chat draft, and thread read capability ids are registered through the signed messaging worker plane
Phone place, receive, transfer, terminate, and transcript record capability ids are registered through the signed phone worker plane

Platform adapter worker client resolution preserves browser, document, voice, email/calendar, messaging, and phone clients from bundles, direct platform attributes, nested runtime attributes, and environment builders
Messaging and phone payload builders preserve tenant, capability, action, connector, approval, recipients or callers, and command metadata without printing secret values
External-write messaging and phone actions continue to require adapter external-effect receipt assessment before succeeded dispatch is admitted
Missing worker clients fail closed with explicit worker_unavailable receipts instead of falling through to unknown capability handling
No provider send, call, connector credential mutation, deployment, or persistence migration is introduced
non_goals: no live SMS send authority claim
no live chat send authority claim
no adapter worker endpoint behavior change
no deployment or production readiness claim
constraints: all messaging and phone execution must route through signed adapter worker clients
effect-bearing send and call actions must remain approval-gated and receipt-backed
worker absence must fail closed with deterministic receipt fields
payload builders must not serialize secret values
existing browser, document, voice, and email/calendar dispatch behavior must remain stable
evidence_required: messaging and phone worker contract regression receipt
standalone SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
